- `RecoverSpinAck` 把 RespinLockedPos 從 RoundInfo 搬到 PlateInfo（必改，否則鎖定全空）

**骨架重畫**（你的兩個確認）：
- `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`（繞過 ROUND_END），plate 內循環不碰 ROUND_END
- ROUND_END = RoundInfo 級，每局一次；兩條循環分離（plate 間走 ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN，RoundInfo 間走 ROUND_END→ForEndToNext→SPIN）

**保留 v1 仍有效的硬核**：getter 化、per-手重入矩陣（omen/scatter 每手重播防護）、LeaveRespinState 補 ENTER_FREE 路由（F-1）、死碼清單、因果鏈窮舉。

1. **續轉手演出**：連鎖 Respin 第 2 手起要不要重播 Respin 宣告動畫？（預設：不重播，只首手播）
2. **Collect/Multiplier 演出時點**：Respin 期間是「最後一手全部 Cash 落定後播一次」，還是每手播當手新增？（預設：末手播一次）

## 兩個降級標記（誠實告知）

- 這版是 **inline 降級自審**（workflow 失控停跑），不是異源對抗產物 → 規格要求**實作後跑 `/dev-review` 補異源審查**（CLAUDE.md R-2 硬要求）
- `NextFeverGameType` 值域：proto 文件「進 FG/Respin」與你說的「只 0/1」措辭不一致——但新設計不讀這欄，對正確性無影響，已標註不擋進度

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

為什麼只有這一個新抽象：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有測試手段（A-14），把可測判斷收進零依賴模組是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置。其餘一律內聯（YAGNI）。\\n\\n```ts\\n/** 雙層游標推進：還有 plate → sub+1 round 不動；否則 round+1 sub 歸 0 */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(round: number, sub: number, plateCount: number): { round: number, sub: number }\\n/** IsGoingToFree 投影：round===0 && queueLen>1 && !isFreeGame */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(round: number, roundQueueLen: number, isFreeGame: boolean): boolean\\n/** IsGoingToRespinGame 投影：sub < plateCount-1（plateCount≤0/缺值恆 false） */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure(sub: number, plateCount: number): boolean\\n/** 解碼 server 鎖定位置為顯示 entry（不掃盤面，位置由 server 給定）：\\n *  對每個 serverPos 解碼 col/row、從 plateSymbol 取 symbol/number；越界/缺值 → 跳過該筆 + 回報 */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: ReadonlyArray<{ Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number, Number?: number }> }> | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number>,\\n    decodePos: (serverPos: number) => { col: number, row: number } | null   // 呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig\\n): { entries: Array<{ serverPos: number, col: number, row: number, symbol: number, number: number }>, warnings: string[] }\\n```\\n\\n- 常數/解碼器**參數注入**（decodePos），模組零依賴、呼叫端餵 Common/Game_Define 值——魔數 single source。\\n- **fail-loud 邊界**：缺欄/越界 → 收進 {決策}\\nROUND_END → ForEndToNext → {IsFreeGame:SPIN/IDLE · else:END}\\n```\\n\\n### 2.2 v2 雙層循環（plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END）\\n\\n```\\n                    ┌──────────────── plate 內循環（不碰 You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>

      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>

  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

為什麼只有這一個新抽象：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有測試手段（A-14），把可測判斷收進零依賴模組是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置。其餘一律內聯（YAGNI）。\\n\\n```ts\\n/** 雙層游標推進：還有 plate → sub+1 round 不動；否則 round+1 sub 歸 0 */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(round: number, sub: number, plateCount: number): { round: number, sub: number }\\n/** IsGoingToFree 投影：round===0 && queueLen>1 && !isFreeGame */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure(sub: number, plateCount: number): boolean\\n/** 解碼 server 鎖定位置為顯示 entry（不掃盤面，位置由 server 給定）：\\n *  對每個 serverPos 解碼 col/row、從 plateSymbol 取 symbol/number；越界/缺值 → 跳過該筆 + 回報 */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: ReadonlyArray<{ Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number, Number?: number }> }> | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number>,\\n    decodePos: (serverPos: number) => { col: number, row: number } | null   // 呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig\\n): { entries: Array<{ serverPos: number, col: number, row: number, symbol: number, number: number }>, warnings: string[] }\\n```\\n\\n- 常數/解碼器**參數注入**（decodePos），模組零依賴、呼叫端餵 Common/Game_Define 值——魔數 single source。\\n- **fail-loud 邊界**：缺欄/越界 → 收進 `warnings`（呼叫端 console.warn），跳過該筆，**不 throw 不靜默**。\\n- v1 的 `ScanRespinLockedPositions`（掃 Cash/Mystery）**移除**——位置改由 server 給定（§0）。\\n- 對應測試：`tests/RespinPlateLogic.test.ts`，遵循 A-14 ts-node 慣例。\\n\\n### 5.2 【修改】GameView.ts\\n\\n1. **旗標 getter 化**（刪 m_isGoingToFree/m_isGoingToRespinGame 欄位與 setter，:494-519）：\\n   ```ts\\n   public get IsGoingToFree(): boolean {\\n       return 對抗審查仍有效的發現（getter per-手重入、F-1 路由斷頭、死碼清單）全部保留\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 0. v1 → v2 變更（前提已變，逐項標明）\\n\\n| 項 | v1（已作廢/修訂） | v2（現行） | 依據 |\\n|----|------------------|-----------|------|\\n| 鎖定位置來源 | client 掃 mid-respin 用 PlateInfo.Win 逐手累加；數值關係待對拍 | proto參數說明 |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 1. 目標\\n\\n1. **消滅旗標可寫狀態**：`IsGoingToFree` / `IsGoingToRespinGame` 由「散落賦值的可寫欄位」改為「協議資料的唯讀 getter 投影」，single source of truth = server 回包，消滅「在哪設 / 在哪清」。\\n2. **索引拆雙層**：`CurPlateIndex`（局索引，索引 RoundQueue）+ 新增 `CurSubPlateIndex`（局內 plate 索引，索引 PlateQueue），推進收斂為單一受控方法。\\n3. **狀態機 plate 內循環**：含 Respin 的 RoundInfo 在內部循環播完所有 plate（繞過 ROUND_END），只在 plate 用盡時進一次 ROUND_END（= RoundInfo 級，ReqRoundEnd 一次）。\\n4. **Respin 接通新協議**：鎖定改讀 server `PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos` 累加 + CheckState 優先序重排 + LeaveRespinState 補 ENTER_FREE 出口 + 刪死碼。\\n5. **支援連鎖 Respin 與「MG 局 Respin 完才進 FG」**：現有流程兩者都走錯（v1 對抗審查對碼證實）。\\n\\n### 1.1 範圍邊界（need given，不可越）\\n\\n不動 proto、不動 FeatureWheel 演出本體、不動 EnterFreeState/LeaveFreeState 演出、不順手清無關死碼。FeatureWheel→Respin 正式接線（誰消費 WheelFeatures）目前不存在（🟢A grep WheelFeatures=2 hits 無流程消費者），**不在本次範圍**——本重構讓 client 具備消化「server 多 plate 回包」的能力。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. 骨架：狀態機流程（v2 核心）\\n\\n### 2.1 一手生命週期（既有，🟢A 已驗證）\\n\\n```\\nSPIN(plate) → EFFECT_START → SCATTER_SHOW → AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → COMMON_SHOW → CHECK_STATE → {決策}\\nROUND_END → ForEndToNext → {IsFreeGame:SPIN/IDLE · else:END}\\n```\\n\\n### 2.2 v2 雙層循環（plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END）\\n\\n```\\n                    ┌──────────────── plate 內循環（不碰 ROUND_END）────────────┐\\n                    ↓                                                          │\\nSPIN(plate k) → … → CHECK_STATE                                               │\\n                    ├ ① IsGoingToRespinGame（還有 plate, sub<len-1）           │\\n                    │     → ENTER_RESPIN（首手:設旗標+鎖col0/5+宣告; 累加鎖定）→ SPIN(plate k+1) ┘\\n                    ├ ② IsRespinGame（plate 用盡）→ LEAVE_RESPIN（清旗標+解鎖+清集合）\\n                    │        ├ IsGoingToFree            → ENTER_FREE\\n                    │        ├ IsFreeGame && 最後一局     → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    │        └ else                      → ROUND_END\\n                    ├ ③ IsGoingToFree                   → ENTER_FREE\\n                    ├ ④ IsFreeGame && 最後一局           → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    └ ⑤ else                            → ROUND_END（RoundInfo 級, ReqRoundEnd 一次）\\n                                                              → ForEndToNext（下一 RoundInfo / END）\\n```\\n\\n**關鍵改點**：v1 的 `ENTER_RESPIN → ROUND_END` 改為 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`（續轉下一手）。RoundInfo 間推進（FG 多局）仍走 `ROUND_END → ForEndToNext → SPIN`；plate 間推進走 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`，兩條循環分離。\\n\\n### 2.3 兩條循環的索引推進\\n\\n- **plate 內**：`SPIN.OnEnter` 呼叫 `AdvancePlateCursor()`：當前 RoundInfo 還有未播 plate → 只推 `CurSubPlateIndex`、`CurPlateIndex` 不動。\\n- **RoundInfo 間**：plate 用盡 → `AdvancePlateCursor()` 推 `CurPlateIndex`、`CurSubPlateIndex` 歸 0。\\n- ∴ ENTER_RESPIN 在 sub 推進**之前**執行（CHECK_STATE 之後、下一個 SPIN 之前），掃的是「剛播完那手」`PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex]`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. 設計前提與證據分級\\n\\n### 3.1 協議前提\\n\\n| ID | 內容 | 證據級 |\\n|----|------|--------|\\n| P-1 | RoundQueue[0]=MainGame；`RoundQueue.length>1 ⟺ 觸發 標註不擋進度，但**不得在規格裡把「NextFeverGameType 恆 0/1」當 🟢A 事實**。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 實作前驗證點（v1 兩個 BLOCKER 已降級）+ 前置步驟\\n\\n### 前置步驟（第一個 commit 之前）\\n\\n1. **commit 現有 working tree**：git status 8 檔 M + 2 未追蹤 png，先 BLOCKER-1，已由骨架解除）\\n\\nplate 循環繞過 ROUND_END ⇒ ReqRoundEnd 仍每 RoundInfo 一次。**剩餘待驗證**（B-3）：framework `roundController` 在「ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN 未經 ROUND_END/未送 ReqRoundEnd」時是否放行下一次 PlateInfo.Win 逐手累加（§5.10）。**剩餘待對拍**：`RoundWin == Σ PlateQueue[].Win` 精確相等（落實公式見 §5.10）。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. 模組與職責\\n\\n### 5.1 【新增】assets/Script/Respin/RespinPlateLogic.ts（全案唯一新檔，零 cc 依賴純函式）\\n\\n> 為什麼只有這一個新抽象：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有測試手段（A-14），把可測判斷收進零依賴模組是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置。其餘一律內聯（YAGNI）。\\n\\n```ts\\n/** 雙層游標推進：還有 plate → sub+1 round 不動；否則 round+1 sub 歸 0 */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(round: number, sub: number, plateCount: number): { round: number, sub: number }\\n/** IsGoingToFree 投影：round===0 && queueLen>1 && !isFreeGame */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(round: number, roundQueueLen: number, isFreeGame: boolean): boolean\\n/** IsGoingToRespinGame 投影：sub < plateCount-1（plateCount≤0/缺值恆 false） */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure(sub: number, plateCount: number): boolean\\n/** 解碼 server 鎖定位置為顯示 entry（不掃盤面，位置由 server 給定）：\\n *  對每個 serverPos 解碼 col/row、從 plateSymbol 取 symbol/number；越界/缺值 → 跳過該筆 + 回報 */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: ReadonlyArray<{ Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number, Number?: number }> }> | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number>,\\n    decodePos: (serverPos: number) => { col: number, row: number } | null   // 呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig\\n): { entries: Array<{ serverPos: number, col: number, row: number, symbol: number, number: number }>, warnings: string[] }\\n```\\n\\n- 常數/解碼器**參數注入**（decodePos），模組零依賴、呼叫端餵 Common/Game_Define 值——魔數 single source。\\n- **fail-loud 邊界**：缺欄/越界 → 收進 `warnings`（呼叫端 console.warn），跳過該筆，**不 throw 不靜默**。\\n- v1 的 `ScanRespinLockedPositions`（掃 Cash/Mystery）**移除**——位置改由 server 給定（§0）。\\n- 對應測試：`tests/RespinPlateLogic.test.ts`，遵循 A-14 ts-node 慣例。\\n\\n### 5.2 【修改】GameView.ts\\n\\n1. **旗標 getter 化**（刪 m_isGoingToFree/m_isGoingToRespinGame 欄位與 setter，:494-519）：\\n   ```ts\\n   public get IsGoingToFree(): boolean {\\n       return IsGoingToRespinPure(this.m_curSubPlateIndex, this.RoundInfo?.PlateQueue?.length ?? 0);\\n   }\\n   ```\\n   空資料回 false 屬正常閒置語意。\\n2. **CurSubPlateIndex**：`private m_curSubPlateIndex = 0`，public 用盡）→ LEAVE_RESPIN（清旗標+解鎖+清集合）\\n                    │        ├ IsGoingToFree            → ENTER_FREE\\n                    │        ├ IsFreeGame && 最後一局     → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    │        └ else                      → ROUND_END\\n                    ├ ③ IsGoingToFree                   → ENTER_FREE\\n                    ├ ④ IsFreeGame && 最後一局           → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    └ ⑤ else                            → ROUND_END（RoundInfo 級, ReqRoundEnd 一次）\\n                                                              → ForEndToNext（下一 RoundInfo / END）\\n```\\n\\n**關鍵改點**：v1 的 `ENTER_RESPIN → ROUND_END` 改為 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`（續轉下一手）。RoundInfo 間推進（FG 多局）仍走 `ROUND_END → ForEndToNext → SPIN`；plate 間推進走 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`，兩條循環分離。\\n\\n### 2.3 兩條循環的索引推進\\n\\n- **plate 內**：`SPIN.OnEnter` 呼叫 `AdvancePlateCursor()`：當前 RoundInfo 還有未播 plate → 只推 `CurSubPlateIndex`、`CurPlateIndex` 不動。\\n- **RoundInfo 間**：plate 用盡 → `AdvancePlateCursor()` 推 `CurPlateIndex`、`CurSubPlateIndex` 歸 0。\\n- ∴ ENTER_RESPIN 在 sub 推進**之前**執行（CHECK_STATE 之後、下一個 SPIN 之前），掃的是「剛播完那手」`PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex]`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. 設計前提與證據分級\\n\\n### 3.1 協議前提\\n\\n| 為什麼只有這一個新抽象：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有測試手段（A-14），把可測判斷收進零依賴模組是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置。其餘一律內聯（YAGNI）。\\n\\n```ts\\n/** 雙層游標推進：還有 plate → sub+1 round 不動；否則 round+1 sub 歸 0 */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(round: number, sub: number, plateCount: number): { round: number, sub: number }\\n/** IsGoingToFree 投影：round===0 && queueLen>1 && !isFreeGame */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(round: number, roundQueueLen: number, isFreeGame: boolean): boolean\\n/** IsGoingToRespinGame 投影：sub < plateCount-1（plateCount≤0/缺值恆 false） */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure(sub: number, plateCount: number): boolean\\n/** 解碼 server 鎖定位置為顯示 entry（不掃盤面，位置由 server 給定）：\\n *  對每個 serverPos 解碼 col/row、從 plateSymbol 取 symbol/number；越界/缺值 → 跳過該筆 + 回報 */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: ReadonlyArray<{ Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number, Number?: number }> }> | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number>,\\n    decodePos: (serverPos: number) => { col: number, row: number } | null   // 呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig\\n): { entries: Array<{ serverPos: number, col: number, row: number, symbol: number, number: number }>, warnings: string[] }\\n```\\n\\n- 常數/解碼器**參數注入**（decodePos），模組零依賴、呼叫端餵 Common/Game_Define 值——魔數 single source。\\n- **fail-loud 邊界**：缺欄/越界 → 收進 `warnings`（呼叫端 console.warn），跳過該筆，**不 throw 不靜默**。\\n- v1 的 `ScanRespinLockedPositions`（掃 Cash/Mystery）**移除**——位置改由 server 給定（§0）。\\n- 對應測試：`tests/RespinPlateLogic.test.ts`，遵循 A-14 ts-node 慣例。\\n\\n### 5.2 【修改】GameView.ts\\n\\n1. **旗標 getter 化**（刪 m_isGoingToFree/m_isGoingToRespinGame 欄位與 setter，:494-519）：\\n   ```ts\\n   public get IsGoingToFree(): boolean {\\n       return content.thinking:
Now I'm seeing actual implementation work! The user has confirmed two design decisions:

1. **Respin announcement animation**: Made optional (can be toggled), even the first hand can skip it (default: not play). Subsequent hands never play it.

2. **Collect performance timing**: Confirmed to play once on the final hand (when all Cash symbols are settled).

The primary session is now editing the design specification document (P1-design-spec.md) to update these decisions from "pending user confirmation" to "user confirmed" status. Three edits were made:

1. Updated EnterRespinState section - changed the announcement animation from "pending confirmation" to "user confirmed" with toggle capability
2. Updated ScatterShowState section - changed Collect/Multiplier performance from "pending confirmation" to "user confirmed" - plays once on final hand
3. Updated the per-hand re-entry matrix table - changed the decision column for ScatterShowState guard behavior to show user confirmation

This is a **decision** type observation - architectural design choices with rationale that have now been finalized by the user.

  <narrative>User confirmed two critical演出 timing decisions for Respin v2 implementation after design specification inquiry. First decision: Respin announcement animation (PlayRespinEnterAnimation) will be togglable via Game_Define constant or GameView flag, allowing even the first hand to skip animation (default: not play). Subsequent hands never play announcement. Implementation wraps animation call in if(isFirstHand && switch) guard, so when switch is off first hand only performs locking/plate switching without演出. Second decision: Collect symbol performance (PlayCollectSymbolShow) and Multiplier fly animation play once on the final hand after all Cash symbols settled, implementing "一次性收集" behavior. The existing IsGoingToRespinGame guard's natural getter semantics (middle hands return true→skip, final hand returns false→allow) precisely implements this requirement with zero code changes to the guard itself—the semantics simply transition from dead code to active. Both decisions resolve "⚠️演出時點待用戶確認" markers in specification sections 5.5, 5.10, and per-hand re-entry matrix section 6, clearing last design ambiguities before implementation begins.</narrative>
